name: run-in-env
description: Activate venv, set env vars, set PYTHONPATH, install pip packages, and run a command or inline Python/Node code with optional timeout, all in one step.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: Command to run (optional if --python-code, --python-stdin, or --node-code is used)

parameters.name: --dir=DIR
parameters.description: Working directory to cd into first

parameters.name: --venv=PATH
parameters.description: Path to venv activate script (default: venv/bin/activate)

parameters.name: --python-path=DIR
parameters.description: Set PYTHONPATH environment variable for module imports (or --py-path=DIR)

parameters.name: --pip-install=PKG
parameters.description: Install Python package(s) via pip (comma-separated or repeatable)

parameters.name: --pip-only
parameters.description: Only install packages without running a command

parameters.name: --pip-list=PATTERN
parameters.description: List installed packages matching pattern via grep -i

parameters.name: --python-code=CODE
parameters.description: Inline Python code to run (written to temp file)

parameters.name: --python-stdin
parameters.description: Read Python script from piped stdin instead of creating temp file

parameters.name: --node-code=CODE
parameters.description: Inline Node code to run instead of a command

examples.expected: python-dotenv installed, gunicorn starts with env vars, killed after 10 seconds

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses cd, venv activation, pip install/listing, env var exports, PYTHONPATH, timeout, and command execution into one step, saving 4-6 steps per command run and 2+ steps per pip-only operation; --python-stdin eliminates temp file creation step when running multi-line Python scripts.
